from typing import List

def factorize(n: int) -> List[int]:
    """ Produces a list containing the prime factors of the input integer, arranged in ascending order. Each factor is included multiple times according to its frequency in the prime factorization. The product of all factors matches the original number.
    >>> factorize(8)
    [2, 2, 2]
    >>> factorize(25)
    [5, 5]
    >>> factorize(70)
    [2, 5, 7]
    """
